zh.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela是Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso和Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya的兒子，於1130年出生在西班牙加利西亞盧戈盧戈。他和Teresa Bermudes de Trava至少有9個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1204年在西班牙加利西亞享年74歲，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納。

nameMeanings.name: Arias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Jorge, Jesus, Arturo, Ramon, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Arias, of disputed origin.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saavedra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Luis, Ramon, Jesus, Rafael, Mario, Pablo, Raul.

Galician: habitational name from any of the places in the Galician provinces of Ourense and Lugo named Saavedra, from saa ‘hall’ (from Gothic sals ‘main house’) + vedro ‘old’ (from Latin vetus). Compare Saabedra , Sabedra , and Savedra .

variants.name: Sabedra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Lupe, Adelina, Aida, Arcelia, Cruz, Demetrio, Elia, Enrique, Ernestina, Esmeralda, Eulalio, Guadalupe.
Hispanic: altered form of Galician   Saavedra  .

variants.name: Savedra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Ramon, Raul, Ricardo, Teofilo, Alberto, Ambrocio, Angel, Aurelio, Basilisa, Carlos, Del Carmen.
Hispanic: altered form of Galician   Saavedra  .

nameMeanings.name: Fernán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela was born in 1130, in Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, Spain as the son of Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso and Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. He had at least 9 sons and 3 daughters with Teresa Bermudes de Trava. He died in 1204, in Galicia, Spain, at the age of 74, and was buried in A Coruña, Galicia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela est né en 1130, à Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, Espagne, fils de Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso et Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles avec Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Il est décédé en 1204, à Galicia, Espagne, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela wurde 1130 in Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, Spanien, als Sohn von Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso und Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya geboren. Er hatte mit Teresa Bermudes de Trava mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Galicia, Spanien und wurde in A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela è nato il nel 1130 nel Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, Spagna come figlio di Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso e Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie con Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Morì nel 1204, nel Galicia, Spagna, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batisselaは1130年にスペインガリシアルゴルゴでArias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y MonterrosoとTeresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minayaの息子として生まれた。彼はTeresa Bermudes de Travaとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1204年にスペインガリシアで74歳で死去し，スペインガリシアア コルnアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela(은)는 1130년 스페인 갈리샤 루고 루고에서 Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso(와)과 Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Teresa Bermudes de Trava(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 스페인 갈리샤에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela nasceu em 1130, em Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, Espanha filho de Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso e Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas com Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Galicia, Espanha, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela родился в 1130 г. в местности луго, луго, галися, Испания. Его родителей звали Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso и Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери от Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности галися, Испания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности а коруnа, галися, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela nació en 1130, en Lugo, Lugo, Galicia, España como hijo de Arias Peres de Saavedra - Señor de Saavedra, Deza y Monterroso y Teresa Fernandez de Castro Alvarez Minaya. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas con Teresa Bermudes de Trava. Murió en 1204, en Galicia, España, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en La Coruña, Galicia, España.
